case_title: JERRY H LANGER VS. WENDY CONDIOTTY ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 SERVED JAN-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONDIOTTY, WENDY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LANGER, JERRY H AS TO DEFENDANT CONDIOTTY, WENDY EPSTEIN, VALERIE L ESTATE OF GERTRUDE D. LANEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

"THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION OVER THIS CLAIM", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT WENDY CONDIOTTY WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING. BOTH DEFENDANTS VALERIE L. EPSETEIN AND ESTATE OF GERTRUDE D. LANEY WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT ESTATE OF GERTRUDE LANEY WAS REPRESENTED BY VALERIE EPSTEIN--CO-PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
